name: omniroute
title: OmniRoute
description: Chat with OmniRoute's local AI router, list models, and check server status from Raycast.
author: wysRocket

commands.name: chat
commands.title: Chat
commands.description: Send a prompt to OmniRoute and stream the reply.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Status
commands.description: Show OmniRoute server health and connection status.

commands.name: ask
commands.title: Ask
commands.description: One-shot quick chat — bind to a hotkey. Pass 'prompt' and optionally 'model' arguments.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: OmniRoute Base URL
preferences.description: Where your local OmniRoute server listens.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key / CLI Token
preferences.description: OmniRoute CLI token (header x-omniroute-cli-token) or a server API key. The CLI token is what `omniroute chat` uses locally.

preferences.name: defaultModel
preferences.title: Default Model
preferences.description: Model id, or 'auto' to let OmniRoute route. Provider/model works too, e.g. gemini-web/gemini-3.5-flash.

preferences.name: autoStartServer
preferences.label: Auto-start when server is down
preferences.title: Auto-start server when down
preferences.description: When the OmniRoute server is down, the menubar item will attempt to start it automatically.

preferences.name: autoCopyOnCompletion
preferences.label: Auto-copy answer when done
preferences.title: Auto-copy answer on completion
preferences.description: When enabled, the Ask and Chat commands auto-copy the answer to clipboard on completion.

preferences.name: askSystemPrompt
preferences.title: Ask System Prompt
preferences.description: System prompt used by the Ask command (one-shot). Leave blank for default.

preferences.name: menubarAutoCopy
preferences.label: Menubar: auto-copy answer
preferences.title: Menubar auto-copy answer
preferences.description: When enabled, the menubar quick-chat auto-copies the answer to clipboard on completion.
